item.title: Getting the Quad Tractor Moving Again
item.description: A look at the tough part of getting the quad tractor moving again on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Getting the Quad Tractor Moving Again
media:content.media:description: A look at the tough part of getting the quad tractor moving again on the farm.

item.title: Quick Fix Turns Into Muddy Field Work
item.description: A quick repair turned into a muddy job in the field, showing the kind of equipment trouble and cleanup farm crews handle during busy workdays.

media:content.media:title: Quick Fix Turns Into Muddy Field Work
media:content.media:description: A quick repair turned into a muddy job in the field, showing the kind of equipment trouble and cleanup farm crews handle during busy workdays.

item.title: A Little Chaos, A Little Progress on the Farm
item.description: A day of farm work with a little chaos and a little progress, the kind of day many in agriculture know well.

media:content.media:title: A Little Chaos, A Little Progress on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A day of farm work with a little chaos and a little progress, the kind of day many in agriculture know well.

item.title: D4 Winch Repair Comeback
item.description: A tough D4 winch put up a fight, but the repair comeback is the best part.

media:content.media:title: D4 Winch Repair Comeback
media:content.media:description: A tough D4 winch put up a fight, but the repair comeback is the best part.

item.title: 9,000 Hours In on the Farm
item.description: We got into the details on this machine and found the wear and history it carries after 9,000 hours of farm work.

media:content.media:title: 9,000 Hours In on the Farm
media:content.media:description: We got into the details on this machine and found the wear and history it carries after 9,000 hours of farm work.

item.title: Brody’s Reaction to the Surprise
item.description: Brody had opinions right away when the surprise showed up. A simple farm moment with equipment and a quick reaction.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s Reaction to the Surprise
media:content.media:description: Brody had opinions right away when the surprise showed up. A simple farm moment with equipment and a quick reaction.

item.title: Finding What Was Missed in the Equipment
item.description: A closer look at farm equipment reveals what was getting missed. Real repair work and problem-solving keep the operation moving.

media:content.media:title: Finding What Was Missed in the Equipment
media:content.media:description: A closer look at farm equipment reveals what was getting missed. Real repair work and problem-solving keep the operation moving.

item.title: Combine Breaks Down After 400 Hours
item.description: A combine quits after less than 400 hours, and the crew works to figure out why before field work falls behind.

media:content.media:title: Combine Breaks Down After 400 Hours
media:content.media:description: A combine quits after less than 400 hours, and the crew works to figure out why before field work falls behind.
